critical_issues.title: Workflow credential type mismatch for AZURE_FUNCTIONAPP_NAME
critical_issues.action: Updated README to require AZURE_FUNCTIONAPP_NAME as an environment variable for cd-infra.yml and as an environment secret for cd-app.yml/cd-promote.yml.

suggestions.title: Add local prerequisite for Azure Functions Core Tools
suggestions.action: Added prerequisite with Microsoft docs link so func start setup is explicit.

suggestions.title: Clarify environment variable/secret scoping
suggestions.action: Specified these values must be configured per deployment environment and identified vars vs secrets usage exactly as referenced by workflow expressions.

suggestions.title: Add Windows virtualenv activation guidance
suggestions.action: Added PowerShell and CMD activation commands for Windows contributors.

suggestions.title: Acceptance criterion #6 is process-level
suggestions.action: This is verified through PR review state, not README text content.
